summary: School bus struck minor crossing street; ORC 4511.75. Pediatric ortho fracture, pin fixation.
Hit-and-run on I-45 outside Houston. Dashcam preserved despite plate unreadable.
Basic Speed Law violation. Plaintiff is single mother of two; family-impact framing aided demand.
